repeat_testing_guidance: Vermont tells private well and spring users to test their water with the Vermont Homeowners Testing Package before choosing PFAS treatment and to use those results to decide whether pretreatment or broader follow-up is needed.
benchmark_notes: Vermont publishes regulated PFAS MCLs and a grouped hazard-index MCL for some PFAS mixtures. Private-well interpretation should stay reference-based and should not be reframed as a household compliance determination.
